calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearling this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lee Batara.
Francisco Flores, Esq. for Plaintiff.
Defendants: Lawrence Rogers and Jade Robers Present with counsel Mark Poe, Esq.
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Parties reached a settlement by stipulation.
(signed by the parties, but not read into the record).
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Judgment on stipulation signed and filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
